distribute_gear.title: Craft additional celestial-tier or netherite weapons for your Villager Recruits army

kingdom_thriving.title: Check your settlement — confirm MCA villagers are healthy, bounty board is active, Via Romana roads are intact

subtitle.text: You came back with the best materials the world can produce. The kingdom deserves them too.

description: Your Villager Recruits army from Ch12 is still equipped with iron swords.
Distribute netherite-tier weapons to your best soldiers.
The army is the kingdom's survival system.
You spent Ch12 building it for exactly this: the end-game period where threats are largest.
- MCA Reborn villagers: are relationships still active?
- Via Romana: are roads connecting your key locations?
- Villager Recruits: are all 6 unit types still active?
- Antique Atlas: does it reflect your current territory?
The kingdom was built in Ch12.
This is Ch16. It has been many chapters.
The kingdom needs maintenance, not just founding.
→ Arm your Villager Recruits with upgraded weapons [check]
→ Confirm the settlement is still functioning [check]
